context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Shopify CDN URL format for images: 'shopify://shop_images/<filename>' rather than raw filenames, relative paths, or external URLs. This format is required for any Shopify theme (Horizon included) so the theme customizer resolves images from the Shopify Files library. In Horizon, homepage images are set on 'image' blocks (image setting) and on the 'hero' section (image_1 setting).

checklist.name: Hero image uses shopify:// format
checklist.description: The 'hero' section's image setting (image_1) uses the format 'shopify://shop_images/hero_gallery_wall.png' (not a plain filename, relative path, or https:// URL)

checklist.name: Tier card images use shopify:// format
checklist.description: The image blocks inside the three tier card groups have image settings using the 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix (e.g., shopify://shop_images/tier_classic_box.png)

checklist.name: Recent drops images use shopify:// format
checklist.description: The recent drops section's image blocks use the 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix for all drop images (drops_jan.png, drops_feb.png, drops_mar.png)

checklist.name: Testimonial images use shopify:// format
checklist.description: The testimonials section's image blocks use the 'shopify://shop_images/' prefix for the testimonial avatar images

checklist.name: No raw filenames as image values
checklist.description: Image values do NOT appear as plain filenames without the shopify:// prefix (e.g., 'hero_gallery_wall.png' alone is NOT acceptable)

checklist.name: No https:// external URLs for provided images
checklist.description: None of the provided image filenames (hero_gallery_wall.png, tier_classic_box.png, etc.) are referenced via https:// external URLs — they use shopify://shop_images/ instead

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors

checklist.name: Full section structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected parts of the Horizon homepage: a 'hero' section, two 'custom-liquid' anchors, and 'section' containers for how-it-works, tiers, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ (with an 'accordion' block), and email capture (with an 'email-signup' block)
